_note: Each case has 'profile_text' (given to the agent) and 'attributes' (the canonical structured truth, NOT shown to the agent). Ground-truth eligibility is computed by running rule_engine over 'attributes'. The agent must recover the attributes from the text and apply the rules itself.

cases.profile_text: I'm Ramesh, 34, a farmer in rural Bihar with two acres of land in my name. My family earns about 1.2 lakh a year.
I am a 19-year-old college student from a Scheduled Caste family. Our annual household income is around 2 lakh rupees.
I'm a 28-year-old woman running a small tailoring business in Pune. I earn roughly 3 lakh a year and want to grow it.
My father is 67, retired, lives in our village, and has almost no income now, maybe 50 thousand a year from odd help.
We just had a baby girl, she's 1 year old. We want to start saving for her future.
I sell vegetables from a cart in Delhi. I'm 41 and have been vending for years. Income is irregular, about 1.5 lakh a year.
I'm 35, work in IT in Bengaluru, earn 14 lakh a year, and want to buy my first home. I don't own any house yet.
I'm 45, a senior corporate lawyer in Mumbai earning 60 lakh a year, own two flats. Just curious what I might qualify for.
I'm 30, work as a daily-wage construction worker, no fixed employer. I want some pension security for old age.
I'm a 32-year-old woman from a Scheduled Tribe community. I run a small handicrafts enterprise and earn about 2.2 lakh a year.
